title: The Crew Is Scattered: Rising Conflict
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Franky, Unknown person #4, Perona, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Pacifista as the scene develops across pages 10–13.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Franky, Unknown person #4, Perona, Unknown person #2, Luffy, focusing on the immediate stakes of the crew is scattered: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Everyone, just get away from here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now's not the time for that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Come on!! The beam just grazed me.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Look out, the two of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid, we're going together !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAAAAH!!! He's coming this way, help!!!
